name: MSI MPG X870E CARBON WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8400+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870ECARBONWIFI7)
shortName: MSI MPG X870E CARBON WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0
description: Flagship MSI MPG ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with dual PCIe 5.0, dual LAN, and WiFi 7.
